files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+{"id":"rich_rust-0vp","title":"Implement Markdown renderable","description":"Phase 3 feature: Implement Markdown rendering to terminal using pulldown-cmark with:
- Headings
- Lists (ordered/unordered)
- Code blocks with syntax highlighting
- Links
- Bold/italic
- Tables

Reference: pulldown-cmark crate, Python Rich markdown module","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:04.730886319-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:04.730886319-05:00"}
+{"id":"rich_rust-bl5","title":"Implement Tree renderable","description":"Phase 3 feature: Implement a Tree renderable for hierarchical data display with:
- Configurable guide characters
- Style support
- Label customization
- Highlighting support

Reference: Python Rich tree module","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:02.40611896-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:02.40611896-05:00"}
+{"id":"rich_rust-gmi","title":"Implement Syntax highlighting renderable","description":"Phase 3 feature: Implement syntax highlighting using the syntect crate with:
- Multiple language support
- Theme selection
- Line numbers
- Word wrap
- Code panel option

Reference: syntect crate, Python Rich syntax module","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:03.700163645-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:03.700163645-05:00"}
+{"id":"rich_rust-iqe","title":"Implement Progress Bar renderable","description":"Phase 3 feature: Implement a Progress Bar renderable with support for:
- Percentage display
- ETA calculation
- Multiple bar styles
- Custom formatters
- Spinner support

Reference: RICH_SPEC.md and Python Rich progress module","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:01.121302693-05:00","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T04:21:01.121302693-05:00"}
